question: Q1
title: Evidence-gap field-bridging bug: graduated cap is dead on the live path
summary: The handler sets extraData.evidenceGapWarning (drives the banner) but never extraData.evidenceGap (drives the verdict cap), so SPECKIT_EVIDENCE_GAP_VERDICT_V1 never fires live. Fix: bridge pipelineResult.metadata.stage4.evidenceGapDetected into extraData. Blast radius: also drives recovery classification.
